day_trace.speech: Hello! I checked last night and the SafetySam thug is definitely a minion! Are you people still pretending to be here? SafetySam, you usually act so fearful and helpless, but it turns out that you are hiding your identity as a minion! The goal today is the same, to directly surrender to SafetySam. If anyone else dares to help him lead the way, I will surrender to death together with that person! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

If anyone else dares to help him lead the way, I will surrender to death together with that person! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

day_trace.speech: Here we go again! Blaze is pretending to be a prophet to accuse SafetySam, which is clearly to disrupt our monitoring of data frequencies! Listen, everyone, I have read the real trump card code of this game during last night's "Special Detection Program". Blaze's irritability was just to disrupt the frequency, and SafetySam's "ordinary" tone was simply to cover up the low-end script of last night's massive identity change! PHD, your set of exclusion procedures is simply a firewall set up to filter out "observers"! I've got the trump card, this scene, and I will definitely expose it!

PHD, your set of exclusion procedures is simply a firewall set up to filter out "observers"! I've got the trump card, this scene, and I will definitely expose it!

day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone finally woke up again! This stage is getting more and more lively. ConspiBro, did you do the "Imaginary Cage" here last night? Blaze, have you discovered that SafetySam is a henchman again? Ha ha ha ha! It was a scene where everyone was breaking news about each other, and they didn't know what they were talking about. This scene was so exciting! Why don't we all just surrender to the most suspicious Blaze? Wouldn't it be more exciting to watch the situation become frightening? Ha ha ha ha!

This scene was so exciting! Why don't we all just surrender to the most suspicious Blaze? Wouldn't it be more exciting to watch the situation become frightening? Ha ha ha ha!

day_trace.speech: Uh...uh...everyone...I really don't know anything...uh...everyone was so noisy in this game. Blaze, you have verified that I am a minion, but I...uh...I'm really afraid of this atmosphere...wuwu...I...I'm just an ordinary person. Let's discuss our identities calmly and stop attacking each other, okay? Woohoo...

I really don't know what it is... uh... everyone was so noisy in the whole game, Blaze Your words have verified that I am a minion, but I... uh... I am really afraid of this atmosphere... wu wu...
